---
title: "CV"
description-meta: "CV summary of Juncheng Zhang"
title-block-banner: false
---

## Education

- **PhD in Economics**, University of Nottingham Ningbo China, 2023-present
- **MSc in Finance and Economics**, University of Southampton, 2020-2021
- **BSc in Finance**, Zhuhai College of Jilin University, 2016-2020

## Academic Affiliation

- PhD Candidate in Economics, School of Economics, University of Nottingham Ningbo China, 2024-present
- Member, CeDEx China, 2023-present
- Lecturer, Guangzhou Institute of Science and Technology, 2022-2023


## Presentation

- The 3rd Xiangjiang River Forum, HNU 2025


## Teaching

**University of Nottingham Ningbo China** — Graduate Teaching Assistant, School of Economics (2024–present)  
*Experimental and Behavioural Economics (ECON2043); Advanced Experimental and Behavioural Economics (ECON3079); Python Programming for Economics (ECON1059)*

**Guangzhou Institute of Science and Technology** — Lecturer, School of Economics and Management (2022–2023)  
*Statistics; Securities Investment*

## Awards

- UNNC PhD Scholarship, 2023-2026
- Dean's List Award, University of Southampton, 2021

## Languages

- Mandarin Chinese, native
- Hakka Chinese, native
- Cantonese, native
- English, fluent
